chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 778 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 03-05-2023 Petitioner is called absent. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioner, who maintains this petition in person, is called absent without any intimation. It appears that instant petition was filed on 11.08.2020, when office raised objection with regard to maintainability of this petition, which has not yet been complied with by the petitioner, which shows that after filing instant petition, the petitioner has lost his interest in this matter. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
